Bash(python3 -c " import sys,json d=json.load\(sys.stdin\) print\(f' Risk Level: {d.get\(\\"risk_level\\",0\):.1f}/100'\) print\(f' Deviation: {d.get\(\\"deviation_pct\\",0\):.5f}%'\) print\(f' Action: {d.get\(\\"action\\",\\"?\\"\)}'\) print\(f' Summary: {d.get\(\\"summary\\",\\"?\\"\)}'\) ")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('SIG:', d.get\('sig','ERR'\)[:30], '...', 'MSG:', d.get\('message','N/A'\)[:50]\)")

Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('TotalDeposited:', d.get\('total_deposited','?'\), '\\nBalances:', d.get\('balances','?'\), '\\nNumTokens:', d.get\('num_tokens','?'\)\)")

Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('Action:', d['decision']['action']\); print\('Confidence:', d['decision']['confidence']\); print\('Risk analysis:', d['decision']['risk_analysis'][:100]\)")
Bash(python3 -c " import sys, json d = json.load\(sys.stdin\) for dec in d[:3]: print\(f\\"Action: {dec['action']:10} Risk: {dec.get\('confidence',0\):3} {dec.get\('created_at',''\)[:19]}\\"\) ")

Bash(python3 -c " import sys,json;d=json.load\(sys.stdin\) tokens=sorted\(set\(o['token'] for o in d.get\('opportunities',[]\)\)\) print\(f' {d[\\"count\\"]} opportunities, tokens: {tokens}'\) " echo "" echo "4. SSE snake_case check" curl -s --max-time 3 http://localhost:8080/api/v1/stream)
Bash(python3 -c " import sys,json d=json.load\(sys.stdin\) for k,v in d.items\(\): if isinstance\(v,dict\): print\(f' {k}: \\${v.get\(\\"price\\",v\):.4f}'\) else: print\(f' {k}: {v}'\) ")

Bash(python3 -c " import sys,json d=json.load\(sys.stdin\) rows=d if isinstance\(d,list\) else d.get\('decisions',d.get\('data',[]\)\) print\(f' Decisions stored: {len\(rows\)}'\) for r in rows[:2]: print\(f' action={r.get\(\\"action\\"\)} risk={r.get\(\\"risk_level\\"\)} ts={str\(r.get\(\\"created_at\\",\\"\\"\)\)[:16]}'\) " curl -s "http://localhost:8080/api/v1/history/stats")

Bash(python3 -c " import sys,json d=json.load\(sys.stdin\) print\(f' probability: {d.get\(\\"probability\\",d.get\(\\"depeg_probability\\",\\"?\\"\)\)}'\) print\(f' risk_score: {d.get\(\\"risk_score\\",\\"?\\"\)}'\) ")

Bash(python3 -c " import sys,json d=json.load\(sys.stdin\) rows=d if isinstance\(d,list\) else d.get\('jobs',d.get\('data',[]\)\) active=[r for r in rows if r.get\('stage'\) not in ['settled_back_to_treasury','failed']] print\(f' Active jobs: {len\(active\)}'\) for r in active[:3]: print\(f' id={r.get\(\\"id\\"\)} stage={r.get\(\\"stage\\"\)} {r.get\(\\"source_symbol\\"\)}→{r.get\(\\"target_symbol\\"\)}'\) ")

Bash(python3 -c " import sys,json d=json.load\(sys.stdin\) for k,v in d.items\(\): if isinstance\(v,dict\) and 'price' in v: print\(f' {k}: \\${v[\\"price\\"]:.4f}'\) elif k not in ['fetched_at','deviation_pct']: print\(f' {k}: {v}'\) " echo "" echo "━━━ 2. RISK ENGINE ━━━" curl -s http://localhost:8080/api/v1/risk/v2)

Bash(python3 -c " import sys,json d=json.load\(sys.stdin\) mints=d.get\('mints',[]\) vt=d.get\('vault_tokens',[]\) print\('Vault token accounts \(on-chain\):'\) for i in range\(min\(5,len\(vt\)\)\): if vt[i] and vt[i] != '11111111111111111111111111111111': print\(f' slot{i} vault_token: {vt[i]}'\) ")
Bash(python3 -c " import sys,json d=json.load\(sys.stdin\) print\('balances:', d.get\('balances'\)\) print\('mints:', d.get\('mints'\)\) print\('vault_tokens:', d.get\('vault_tokens'\)\) ")

Bash(python3 -c " import sys,json d=json.load\(sys.stdin\) feeds=d.get\('parsed',[d]\) if isinstance\(d,dict\) else d if feeds: f=feeds[0] price=f.get\('price',{}\) p=int\(price.get\('price',0\)\)*10**int\(price.get\('expo',0\)\) print\(f' USDC price: \\${p:.6f} \(LIVE\)'\) ")

Bash(python3 -c " import sys,json d=json.load\(sys.stdin\) pools=d.get\('data',[]\) targets=['kamino','marginfi','drift','solend','jito','save'] found=[] for p in pools: proj=p.get\('project',''\).lower\(\) chain=p.get\('chain',''\).lower\(\) sym=p.get\('symbol',''\) apy=p.get\('apy',0\) tvl=p.get\('tvlUsd',0\) if chain=='solana' and any\(t in proj for t in targets\) and sym in ['USDC','USDT','SOL','ETH','BTC','PYUSD'] and apy>0: found.append\({ 'project':p.get\('project'\), 'symbol':sym,'apy':apy, 'tvl':tvl/1e6, 'pool':p.get\('pool'\), 'apyBase':p.get\('apyBase',0\), 'apyReward':p.get\('apyReward',0\) }\) found.sort\(key=lambda x:-x['apy']\) print\(f'Total: {len\(found\)} pools'\) for f in found[:20]: print\(f' {f[\\"project\\"]:20} {f[\\"symbol\\"]:6} APY={f[\\"apy\\"]:.2f}% TVL=\\${f[\\"tvl\\"]:.0f}M pool={f[\\"pool\\"]}'\) ")

Bash(python3 -c " import sys,json d=json.load\(sys.stdin\) pools=d.get\('data',[]\) seen=set\(\) for p in pools: proj=p.get\('project',''\).lower\(\) chain=p.get\('chain',''\).lower\(\) if chain=='solana' and \('margin' in proj or 'drift' in proj or 'jito' in proj\): if proj not in seen: seen.add\(proj\) print\(f' project: {p.get\(\\"project\\"\)}'\) ")

Bash(python3 -c " import sys,json d=json.load\(sys.stdin\) pools=d.get\('data',[]\) projs={} for p in pools: if p.get\('chain',''\).lower\(\)=='solana' and p.get\('symbol'\) in ['USDC','USDT','SOL','ETH','BTC'] and p.get\('apy',0\)>0.5: pr=p.get\('project',''\) if pr not in projs: projs[pr]=[] projs[pr].append\(f'{p[\\"symbol\\"]}={p[\\"apy\\"]:.1f}%'\) for pr,syms in sorted\(projs.items\(\)\): print\(f' {pr}: {syms}'\) ")

Bash(python3 -c " import zipfile, xml.etree.ElementTree as ET, re with zipfile.ZipFile\('Задачи - National Solana Hackathon by Decentrathon РУС.docx', 'r'\) as z: with z.open\('word/document.xml'\) as f: tree = ET.parse\(f\) root = tree.getroot\(\) ns = {'w': 'http://schemas.openxmlformats.org/wordprocessingml/2006/main'} texts = [] for para in root.iter\('{http://schemas.openxmlformats.org/wordprocessingml/2006/main}p'\): text = ''.join\(t.text or '' for t in para.iter\('{http://schemas.openxmlformats.org/wordprocessingml/2006/main}t'\)\) if text.strip\(\): texts.append\(text.strip\(\)\) print\('\\n'.join\(texts\)\) ")
